features.title: Scaffold app, schema, and baseline tooling
doneCriteria: Next.js App Router + TypeScript + Tailwind project exists
SQLite DB configured with ORM
Initial schema/migration created for sources, offender_records, geocoded_locations
evidence: npm run db:generate -> Drizzle SQL migration generated
npm run db:migrate -> migrations applied successfully

features.title: Crawler for Taipei DOT listing with pagination and dedupe
doneCriteria: crawl_sources.py discovers PDF links across pages
Supports PageSize fallback strategy
Stores title/date/sourceUrl/pdfUrl with dedupe and request politeness
evidence: scripts/crawl_sources.py implemented with pagination, PDF extraction, URL dedupe, delay, User-Agent, and source logging

features.title: Single PDF importer and parser with confidence/review flags
doneCriteria: import_pdf.py supports --url and --file
Table-first parser with text fallback
Extracts required columns and stores raw fact text
Parses violation count/type/alcohol and writes needsReview when incomplete
evidence: scripts/import_pdf.py and scripts/parser.py implemented for URL/file imports, pdfplumber table parsing, text fallback, confidence, needsReview, count/type/alcohol parsing

features.title: Records API and dashboard table with filters
doneCriteria: GET /api/records and GET /api/stats implemented
Dashboard shows summary cards and filterable table
Advanced/disabled-by-default name search
evidence: Dashboard table, filters, summary cards, and advanced-disabled name search implemented

features.title: Cached geocoding and optional map tab
doneCriteria: geocode_locations.py caches Nominatim results with UA and rate limit
GET /api/locations implemented
Map tab lazy-loads clustered location markers with grouped popups
evidence: scripts/geocode_locations.py implemented with cached Nominatim geocoding and location-only queries

features.title: Admin import flows and logs
doneCriteria: POST /api/import/crawl, /api/import/pdf-url, /api/import/pdf-file, GET /api/import/logs
Basic env-token protection for admin endpoints
Admin page shows parser logs and needsReview rows

features.title: Tests, seed, and README
doneCriteria: Crawler/parser/type/geocode/API tests exist and pass
Seed script imports example PDF URL
README covers setup/import/privacy/limitations
evidence: npm run lint, typecheck, test, build, and ./init.sh passed
